title: SkyDeathBack
description: A DeathBack Plugin That TP To your death Using /back
body:
**🪦 SkyDeathBack — Never Lose Your Death Spot Again!**

**Author:** RockSky | **Minecraft Versions:** 1.20 – 1.21+

**SkyDeathBack is a lightweight yet powerful plugin that lets players teleport back to their death location safely and easily!
No more rage-quitting after dying in lava — just use /back and return to where it all went wrong.**

**⚙️ Features**

✅ Return to your last death location using /back

✅ 5-second delay before teleport — cancel on move or damage

✅ Fully customizable config.yml

✅ Optional system with /deathgui to view your recent deaths (up to 5)

✅ Cool effects, messages, and permissions

✅ Works seamlessly on Spigot, Paper, bukkit (1.20–1.21+)

**💡 Permissions**

🔥 **skydeathback.use:** Allows using the /back command

🔥 **skydeathback.bypass.cooldown:** Bypass cooldown restriction

🔥 **skydeathback.bypass.delay:** Instant teleport without delay

🔥 **skydeathback.admin**: Access All Plugin Features
